expr: (async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#amount','11800'); document.querySelector('#mode [data-v=incl]').click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); return { base: document.querySelector('#r-base').textContent, cgst: document.querySelector('#r-cgst').textContent, total: document.querySelector('#r-total').textContent }; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#amount','1500'); set('#due','2026-04-27'); set('#asof','2026-06-11'); set('#feeval','1.5'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); return { days: document.querySelector('#r-days').textContent, fee: document.querySelector('#r-fee').textContent, demand: document.querySelector('#demand').value.slice(0,80) }; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#income','80000'); set('#expenses','8000'); set('#tax','25'); set('#days','180'); set('#hours','6'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); return { gross: document.querySelector('#r-gross').textContent, day: document.querySelector('#r-day').textContent, hour: document.querySelector('#r-hour').textContent }; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#cost','60'); set('#price','100'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); return { margin: document.querySelector('#r-margin').textContent, markup: document.querySelector('#r-markup').textContent }; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-client','Globex'); set('#f-number','INV-042'); set('#f-amount','1500'); set('#f-due','2026-05-01'); set('#f-upi','acme@upi'); document.querySelector('#tone [data-v=final]').click(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,200)); const body=document.querySelector('#out-body').value; return { subject: document.querySelector('#out-subject').value, hasOverdue: body.includes('overdue'), hasUpi: body.includes('upi://pay'), tone: body.includes('final notice') }; })()

(async () => { const set=(s,v)=>{const e=document.querySelector(s);e.value=v;e.dispatchEvent(new Event('input',{bubbles:true}))}; set('#f-upi','test@okaxis'); set('#f-name','Test'); set('#f-amount','500'); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,700)); return { qr: !!document.querySelector('#qr-box img'), caption: document.querySelector('#qr-caption').textContent }; })()

(async () => { const csv = 'Client Name,Description,Quantity,Rate
Globex,Retainer,1,1500
Initech,Maintenance,4,250
'; const input = document.querySelector('#csv-file'); const dt = new DataTransfer(); dt.items.add(new File([csv],'t.csv',{type:'text/csv'})); input.files = dt.files; input.dispatchEvent(new Event('change',{bubbles:true})); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,600)); const count = document.querySelector('#row-count').textContent; document.querySelector('#generate').click(); for (let i=0;i<40;i++){ await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,500)); if (document.querySelector('#progress').textContent.startsWith('Done')) break; } const db = await import('/assets/js/store.js'); const docs = await db.all('documents'); return { count, progress: document.querySelector('#progress').textContent, saved: docs.map(d=>d.number+':'+d.total) }; })()

(async () => { const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.getRegistration(); await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,3000)); const keys = await caches.keys(); const cache = keys.length ? await caches.open(keys[0]) : null; const cached = cache ? (await cache.keys()).length : 0; return { sw: !!reg, swState: reg && (reg.active ? 'active' : reg.installing ? 'installing' : 'waiting'), cacheKeys: keys, cachedEntries: cached }; })()
